title: Junior SEO Specialist at Treebo Hotels

jsonLd.title: Junior SEO Specialist at Treebo Hotels
jsonLd.description:
Treebo Hotels invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of SEO Specialist at our Visakhapatnam location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Treebo Hotels:
Treebo Hotels is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Treebo Hotels!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
